# Subscriptions.IsChangeNotificationMethod method

Returns `true` when *method* is one of the four subscription change kinds (R-10.5-a).

```csharp
public static bool IsChangeNotificationMethod(string method)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| method | The notification method name. |

## Return Value

`true` when it is a change kind.
